locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: System Type: Dry Pipe, 20 years old, Manufacturer: Reliable, NFPA 13 Compliant: Yes
6 control valves inspected. All found in open position.
Visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed on sprinkler heads.
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply.
Water Supply: Static Pressure 42 psi, Residual Pressure 49 psi, Flow 1029 GPM, Supply Adequate: Yes.
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Clear combustible storage to maintain at least 18 inches of clearance below sprinkler deflectors.
Repair exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.
Ensure all control valve tamper switches are properly connected.
